stem: A software testing study surveys 1000 test cases and observes 412 positive outcomes out of 1000 (41.2%). Estimate the true software bug rate and provide a 95% confidence interval.

ground_truth.answer: Sample proportion: 0.412. Wilson 95% CI: [0.3819, 0.4428]. Point estimate: 0.4123.

common_failure_modes: Using the Wald interval (p̂ ± z√(p̂(1-p̂)/n)) which performs poorly for small samples
Not reporting the confidence interval alongside the point estimate
